thread.title: The United States recognizes Edmundo González Urrutia as president of Venezuela
thread.title_full: The United States recognizes Edmundo González Urrutia as president of Venezuela

author: archyworldyscom
title: The United States recognizes Edmundo González Urrutia as president of Venezuela
text:
Who is Edmundo González? <a href="https://www.archyworldys.com/finally-the-unitary-platform-managed-to-register-a-candidate-for-the-presidential-elections-in-venezuela-after-the-extension-of-the-cne/" title="Finally, the Unitary Platform managed to register a candidate for the presidential elections in Venezuela after the extension of the CNE”> Edmundo González Urrutia has emerged as a key figure in Venezuela’s opposition, offering an alternative to the presidency of Nicolás Maduro , head of the ruling Chavista party, in July 28 elections. To his 74 years old this veteran diplomat and former ambassador is the presidential candidate of the Table of Democratic Unity (MUD), after a series of disqualifications that excluded other candidates such as María Corina Machado from the race. Today he is Maduro’s main opponent at the polls.
The truth is that González Urrutia’s career in the public sphere is quite long, starting with the diplomatic one. He played significant roles in the Venezuelan Ministry of Foreign Affairs having been the entity’s director of International Policy, first secretary of his country’s Embassy in Washington, ambassador to Algeria and Argentina. A career that gave him an image of honorability and respect both nationally and internationally.
He graduated in international studies at the Central University of Venezuela and has a master’s degree in international relations from American University. On the political level itself, he was the international representative and president of the MUD.
In addition to being a good official, Edmundo González kept a low profile in Venezuelan politics. However, After the disqualification of prominent candidates such as Machado, the opposition decided to unite around his figure considering him a moderate and conciliatory candidate. This decision was made in an attempt to consolidate strong opposition to Chavismo.
Read also: What time do elections start and end in Venezuela? Proposals by Edmundo González Edmundo González Urrutia’s campaign focused on reconciliation and depoliticization of Venezuelan institutions . His most notable proposal is the release of more than 200 political prisoners, a demand the opposition has supported for years. Furthermore, González Urrutia promises to depoliticize the military, raise wages and promote free enterprise and free markets.
Another of his priorities is Venezuela’s economic recovery . González seeks to implement policies that reduce inflation, stabilize the currency and eliminate poverty, with the aim of facilitating the return of the millions of Venezuelans who have emigrated in recent years and contributing to the lifting of sanctions.
It must be said that the opposition, especially the González-Machado couple, enjoys widespread support among the millions of Venezuelan emigrants and this is largely due to previous proposals. Anyway, It is difficult to calculate that victory will be achieved with the votes coming from abroad since for example in the case of Colombia only 7,012 of the 2.8 million Venezuelans present in the territory are authorized to vote.
Another important proposal by González concerns a extensive state control with a view to a gradual recovery of the institutions, with accountability mechanisms and extreme transparency. There is also a fight against insecurity.
